title: Labor secretary’s top aides resigning amid IG probe
author: Sophie Brams
fullText: Two top staffers in Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer’s office have reportedly resigned amid an internal probe into allegations of misconduct. Chavez-DeRemer’s chief of staff, Jihun Han, and his deputy, Rebecca Wright, were under investigation regarding accusations that taxpayer dollars were used on personal trips with family and friends, according to the New York Post, which…
